# Onepage HTML Report

## Project Summary
Onepage HTML Report is an AI agent skill (for Claude Code, Cursor, Zed, Codex, and 30+ agents) that generates self-contained, single-page HTML reports with Chart.js charts, dark/light theming, and caveman-style brevity. Reports are chart-first, print-friendly, and require zero server infrastructure.

## Key Features
- Chart.js integration: line, bar, doughnut, scatter, multi-line, sparkline
- Dark/Light theme: auto-detects system preference, manual toggle
- Caveman-style brevity: data-dense labels, zero filler text
- Single HTML file output: no build step, no dependencies beyond CDN
- Print-friendly: @media print styles included
- Zero server cost: all rendering client-side via Chart.js CDN
- MIT License: free forever

## Installation
Command: npx skills add Pratchaya0/one-page-report
Agent-specific: npx skills add Pratchaya0/one-page-report -a [claude|cursor|zed|codex|windsurf|copilot|cline|gemini]

## Supported Agents
Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, Zed, Codex, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and 30+ agents supporting npx skills add.

## How It Works
1. AI agent reads SKILL.md instruction + template.html
2. Agent builds body HTML: header → metrics → chart panels → optional table → footer
3. Agent injects Chart.js script blocks per canvas
4. Agent replaces {{TITLE}} and {{BODY}} placeholders
5. Writes single-file HTML to reports/<name>-<date>.html

## Repository
GitHub: https://github.com/Pratchaya0/one-page-report
Landing: https://one-page-report.vercel.app
